name: Mexican Chocolate-Pecan Riches
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler or heavy saucepan over low heat, melt chocolate and butter. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, beat eggs to blend. Add sugar, corn syrup, chocolate mixture, vanilla, and cinnamon. Stir in pecans.
3. Pour into a greased 2-quart, 2-inch deep baking dish. Place the dish in a pan with 1/2 inch of hot water.
4. Bake in a preheated 350 degree F oven for 40 minutes or until set. Remove from water and cool thoroughly on a rack.
5. Spoon into dessert dishes. Makes 8 generous servings.
